name: Dried-Fruit Cake Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Freshly grated orange peel (or lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Line a 9 by 13 inch baking pan with foil.
3. Spray the foil with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Using an electric mixer, beat together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in egg, vanilla extract, and orange peel.
6. Slowly stir in flour until blended.
7. Add chopped fruit to the mixture.
8. Scrape the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until set and golden brown around the edges.
10. Cool in the pan on a rack.
11. Sprinkle powdered sugar generously over all.
12. Cut into squares.
